Surname.jp: 他国の人見知りな死霊術師

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce the targets' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>Buffs</color> from the target and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burn</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nIf the target is Earth Element, this attack does not miss and decreases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태로 만듭니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 빗나감이 발생하지 않으며 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2つ</color>解除し、<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を付与する。\n対象が地属性の場合、ミスが発生せず<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n若目标为地属性,则不会发生闪避,并使<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> of all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAdditionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nIf the target is Earth Element, this attack does not miss.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 감소시킵니다.\n추가로 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복 불가</color>를 부여합니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 빗나감이 발생하지 않습니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>をDOWNさせる。\nさらに<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を付与する。\n対象が地属性の場合、ミスが発生しない。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n此外,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率对全体敌人施加<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n若目标为地属性,则不会发生闪避。

name.jp: イプシロンの複合強化III

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Grants an <color=#28d9ed>extra turn</color> when using <color=#28d9ed>No One Lives Forever</color>.

Grants permanent irremovable <color=#28d9ed>increased Effectiveness</color> to <color=#28d9ed>Eternal</color> at the start of battle.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
<color=#28d9ed>영원히 살 수는 없어</color> 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>이터널</color>은 전투 입장 시 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중 증가</color>를 영구적으로 보유합니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
<color=#28d9ed>【永遠の命などない】</color>使用時、<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>【エターナル】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が永続的にUPする。この効果は解除されない。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
使用<color=#28d9ed>世上无永生</color>时,获得<color=#28d9ed>额外回合</color>。

<color=#28d9ed>伊特诺</color>在战斗开始时,永久获得无法解除的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中提升</color>效果。
